earlyVoting.notes: Mail ballots automatically sent to all registered voters

acceptedIds: Arizona driver license or nonoperating ID
U.S. federal, state, or local government ID
votingRules.phonesAtPollsDetail: Phones are permitted at Arizona polling places, but photographing ballots or other voters is prohibited.

primaryParticipation.ruleExplanationEn: Arizona has a semi-closed primary (A.R.S. §16-467). Voters registered with a party may only vote in that party's primary. Voters registered as independent or with no party preference (NPP) may vote in the Republican or Democratic primary if that party chooses to allow independent participation. Both major parties currently allow independent participation in their 2026 Arizona primaries.
primaryParticipation.ruleExplanationEs: Arizona tiene una primaria semi-cerrada (A.R.S. §16-467). Los votantes registrados en un partido solo pueden votar en la primaria de ese partido. Los votantes registrados como independientes o sin preferencia de partido (NPP) pueden votar en la primaria Republicana o Demócrata si ese partido elige permitir la participación independiente. Ambos partidos principales actualmente permiten la participación independiente en las primarias de Arizona 2026.
